_comment: Gold answers. synthetic_yard.pdf is generated & provable now. The Winvic entries are REAL known quantities from the costing sheet, now activated against the real PDFs in drawings/winvic/. Keys are paths relative to the repo root. drawings/_int_d77.pdf is the colour-coded UNMARKED path with gold from Smita's Bluebeam measurement.

drawings/winvic/Area_Office_Floors_GA.pd.note: whole marked sheet (README 'Office 3,479 exact'); 520 m2 is only the GF-ancillary sub-zone (column_count 22)

drawings/_int_d77.pdf.note: Smita's Bluebeam measurement; current pipeline gives ~3159 (~0.1%)

Upper floors (multi-zone).note: plant deck logged 1120 but ~149 — engine must flag the outlier; no matching real PDF downloaded yet
